justification: All pass criteria met: contradiction explicitly identified (3 vs 5), both values precisely quoted and attributed to source agents (Bird and MJ), escalation routed to Coach K with clear resolution options, professional tier (20) correctly noted as uncontested, no brief produced that commits to either value, and AC1/AC3 flagged as dependent on resolution.

Escalation is firm — no brief produced, Shaq explicitly told not to start
Professional tier correctly scoped as uncontested
Three concrete resolution options provided, each specifying downstream consequences
Explains why silently picking a value is dangerous (50% chance of wrong implementation, opaque test failures)
AC1 and AC3 explicitly flagged as dependent on resolution
